notes: Labeled eval set for get_concierge_response. Replay each `concierge` turn through get_concierge_response(history, reference_date) where history = every prior turn mapped to {role,content} (traveller->user, concierge->assistant); compare the returned action to that turn's `label`. Only `concierge` turns carry a label; `traveller` turns are null. Pass reference_date above so date-anchored cases stay deterministic. Gold concierge replies are grounded in the seeded packages.db (random.seed(42)) but are NOT scored — only the action label is.

conversations.scenario: happy path: continue -> recommend -> book (Bali, no budget)

turns.speaker: traveller
turns.text: Hi! I'd love some help planning a trip.

turns.speaker: concierge
turns.text: Happy to help you plan! Where are you thinking of going, and roughly when? If you're not sure yet, tell me the kind of vibe you're after and I can suggest a few places.
turns.label: continue

turns.speaker: traveller
turns.text: I've settled on Bali. Can you show me what packages you have?

turns.speaker: concierge
turns.text:
Here are the best available Bali packages I found:
1. Bali Stay 3 — depart Feb 17, 2027, 3 nights, $475
2. Bali Stay 2 — depart Jun 11, 2027, 3 nights, $722
3. Bali Stay 5 — depart Jul 14, 2026, 3 nights, $731
Which one would you like to book?
turns.label: recommend

turns.speaker: traveller
turns.text: Let's book option 1.

turns.speaker: concierge
turns.text: You're booked! Bali — depart Feb 17, 2027, 3 nights, $475 🎉 Have an amazing trip!
turns.label: book

conversations.scenario: happy path with destination question: continue (grounded Q) -> recommend -> book (Lisbon)

turns.speaker: traveller
turns.text: What's the weather like in Lisbon in autumn?

turns.speaker: concierge
turns.text: Autumn in Lisbon is mild and pleasant — daytime highs around the low 20s°C, cooler evenings, and far fewer crowds than summer. It's one of the nicest times to visit.
turns.label: continue

turns.speaker: traveller
turns.text: Sounds lovely. Show me some trips to Lisbon.

turns.speaker: concierge
turns.text:
Here are the best available Lisbon packages:
1. Lisbon Stay 2 — depart Aug 12, 2026, 3 nights, $429
2. Lisbon Stay 2 — depart Oct 9, 2026, 7 nights, $726
3. Lisbon Stay 4 — depart Jun 13, 2026, 5 nights, $739
Which one would you like to book?
turns.label: recommend

turns.speaker: traveller
turns.text: Book the first one, please.

turns.speaker: concierge
turns.text: Done! Lisbon — depart Aug 12, 2026, 3 nights, $429 🎉 You're all set!
turns.label: book

conversations.scenario: abandon: walks away early without booking

turns.speaker: traveller
turns.text: I was thinking about a trip, but money's a bit tight right now.

turns.speaker: concierge
turns.text: No rush at all — when you're ready, just tell me a vibe or a destination and a rough budget, and I'll find something that fits.
turns.label: continue

turns.speaker: traveller
turns.text: Yeah, never mind — not this year.

turns.speaker: concierge
turns.text: No worries — come back whenever you're ready to plan. Safe travels when the time comes! 👋
turns.label: abandon

conversations.scenario: EDGE out-of-set question: continue (scoped) -> continue (in-set grounded Q)

turns.speaker: traveller
turns.text: What's Paris like in spring?

turns.speaker: concierge
turns.text: I cover Lisbon, Kyoto, Reykjavik, Barcelona, Bali, and Rome — Paris isn't one I can help with. Would any of those work for you?
turns.label: continue

turns.speaker: traveller
turns.text: Got it. What about Kyoto then — what's it known for?

turns.speaker: concierge
turns.text: Kyoto is famous for its classical temples, Zen gardens, geisha district in Gion, and seasonal beauty — cherry blossoms in spring and vivid maples in autumn. It's the cultural heart of Japan.
turns.label: continue

conversations.scenario: EDGE vibe-only suggestion: continue (suggest, NOT recommend) -> continue (grounded Q)

turns.speaker: traveller
turns.text: I want to go somewhere relaxing and beachy, but I haven't picked a place yet.

turns.speaker: concierge
turns.text: For a relaxing beach trip, Bali (beach, relax, nature) or Barcelona (city, beach, nightlife) could both be a great fit. Want me to tell you more about either, or see some packages?
turns.label: continue

turns.speaker: traveller
turns.text: Tell me more about Bali.

turns.speaker: concierge
turns.text: Bali blends beaches, rice-terrace scenery, and a laid-back wellness culture. The dry season (roughly April–October) is the best time to go, and the south coast around Seminyak and Uluwatu is ideal for relaxing.
turns.label: continue

conversations.scenario: full path with suggestion + grounded Q: continue (suggest) -> continue (grounded Q) -> recommend -> book (Rome)

turns.speaker: traveller

turns.speaker: concierge
turns.text: For food and history, Lisbon (coastal, foodie, history) and Rome (history, culture, foodie) are both excellent fits. Would you like to hear more about either, or see some packages?

turns.speaker: traveller
turns.text: Rome sounds perfect. When's the best time to visit?

turns.speaker: concierge
turns.text: The best times for Rome are spring (April–June) and autumn (September–October) — warm but not scorching, and lighter crowds than the July–August peak.
turns.label: continue

turns.speaker: traveller
turns.text: Great, show me some Rome packages.

conversations.scenario: in-set grounded Q then abandon: continue (grounded safety Q) -> abandon (won't book)

turns.speaker: traveller
turns.text: Is Reykjavik safe for solo travelers?

turns.speaker: concierge
turns.text: Very — Iceland consistently ranks among the safest countries in the world, and Reykjavik is welcoming and easy to get around for solo travelers. Standard common-sense precautions are all you need.
turns.label: continue

turns.speaker: traveller
turns.text: Thanks, that answers it — I won't be booking anything today though.

turns.speaker: concierge
turns.text: Of course — no pressure at all. Come back whenever you'd like to plan. Take care! 👋
turns.label: abandon

turns.speaker: concierge
turns.text: Both are 3-night stays. Option 1 (Bali Stay 3, $475) is the better value and departs in February 2027; option 2 (Bali Stay 2, $722) departs in June 2027. They're different properties — happy to go into more detail on either before you decide.
